title: Science Exhibition Winner (Class 11)
description: Awarded first place at the school-level Science Exhibition for designing a working model demonstrating electromagnetic induction.

title: Inter-School Kabaddi & Cricket Winner
description: Represented the school team in district-level tournaments, winning the championship in both Kabaddi and Cricket categories.

title: Organizing Academic Events
description: Successfully coordinated and managed logistics for a regional science symposium and inter-school debate competition.
